name: ZJU low/high altitude rotor-drag ratio
note: Paper conclusion: rotor drag at low altitude declines substantially beyond the sqrt(T) prediction.

name: ZJU mixing matrix ground sensitivity
note: Paper reports torque-coefficient changes k_TX/k_I are negligible (<10%) versus around 30% thrust-coefficient change near ground.
